User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Allow all major AI crawlers
User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://pcfginsurance.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://pcfginsurance.com/local-seo-sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_astro/
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /*?*token=
Disallow: /*?*session=

# Allow important pages
Allow: /contact
Allow: /about
Allow: /services
Allow: /commercial-quote
Allow: /personal-lines-quote
Allow: /ai-knowledge-base/

# Local SEO specific
Allow: /*insurance*
Allow: /*quote*
Allow: /*parish*
Allow: /*ny*
Allow: /*new-york*
